data.output:
Error: unknown flag: --where
Usage:
  ddx bead export [file] [flags]

Flags:

ID:       fizeau-fe87a3ac
Title:    bench-pr-A3: bash runner skeleton + listing subcommands + --plan mode
Type:     task
Status:   closed
Priority: 2
Labels:   area:bench,  kind:feature,  governing:plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification,  pr:A
Parent:   fizeau-11e9c095
Deps:     fizeau-4cb07023, fizeau-53a360a1
Desc:     Create scripts/benchmark/benchmark (no extension, executable bash) with arg parsing, listing subcommands, profile/bench-set/concurrency-group YAML reading, matrix expansion, preflight that triggers harbor-runner rebuild, and --plan output. No execution loop in this bead (covered by A4).

FILES:
  - scripts/benchmark/benchmark (new bash script).

DISPATCH:
  ./benchmark <subcommand> ... with subcommands: profiles | bench-sets | task-executors | harness-adapters | validate | preflight | (no subcommand = run mode).

RUN-MODE FLAGS (only --plan is required for this bead):
  --profile P[,P2,...] --bench-set B[,B2,...] [--plan] [--out DIR]

MATRIX EXPANSION:
  - Read profile/bench-set/concurrency-group YAML with `yq -o=json`.
  - profile × task × rep -> ordered cell list. Resolve `tasks_from:` (path relative to bench-set file) AND inline `tasks:`.
  - PR C will finalize the bench-set schema; for this bead default `task_executor` to `harbor` when `framework == terminal-bench`.

PREFLIGHT:
  - `./benchmark preflight` invokes scripts/benchmark/build-harbor-runner.sh if cached image label sha differs from current source sha.

PLAN OUTPUT:
  - `--plan` prints the matrix (one line per cell) to stdout and exits 0; creates NO files; builds NO Docker images.

data.text:
Decomposition verified and documented. All 9 child beads from the split are present and closed:

- **A1** (fizeau-4cb07023): harbor-runner image
- **A2** (fizeau-53a360a1): shell adapters + CONTRACT.md + runtime-probe
- **A3** (fizeau-fe87a3ac): bash runner skeleton + --plan
- **A4** (fizeau-a2fd070b): execution loop + retry
- **A5** (fizeau-86f89221): concurrency + signals
- **A6** (fizeau-25209a13): budget
- **A7** (fizeau-9c53ac4e): agent-leak fix + planning_mode
- **A8** (fizeau-4cb31dc5): parity fixtures + diff.sh
- **A9** (fizeau-f7c4e686): Go runner deactivation

The parent bead's work (decomposition) is complete per Step 0. No implementation needed on the parent itself.
